reports.details: Suspect note submitted. Failed features: Security Thread. Confidence: 20% counterfeit likelihood.
Suspect note submitted. Failed features: Security Thread, Mahatma Gandhi Watermark, Bleed Lines & Tactile Marks, Serial Number, Ashoka Pillar Emblem. Confidence: 100% counterfeit likelihood.

Victim: John Doe | Phone: 9876543210 | Lost: Rs. 01000 via UPI | Original Text: "URGENT: This is FedEx customer care. Your parcel containing MDMA drugs and fake passports sent to Ca..."
Claimed to be CBI Mumbai Customs regarding MDMA found in a FedEx package. Demanded Rs. 5 Lakhs transfer.
Telegram rating task scam. Asked for Rs. 50,000 security deposit to upgrade to VIP level.
Detected fake note at local retail store. Security thread printed directly with flat colors.
